fixture_minutes_text:
DECISION: Approve the ITU two-point criteria at -10.5 dB and -6 dB for FSS protection.
DECISION: Defer the EPFD calculation methodology to the next meeting.
ACTION: NTIA generates data request for additional military system information.

fixture_extracted_items.text: ITU two-point protection criteria of -10.5 dB and -6 dB approved for FSS protection in this meeting.
Action: NTIA will generate a data request for additional military system information.
